description: Manual correction layer for generated topic-bank packets. Decisions are applied during topic-bank generation and do not modify raw question_bank.json.

records.question_id: string; must exist in the input question bank
records.reviewed_topic: required for relabel; topic id, label slug, alias, or canonical topic id
records.reviewed_subtopic: optional; subtopic id, label slug, alias, or canonical subtopic id
records.reviewed_skill: optional; reviewer-facing exact skill or note, not used as a packet route
records.reason: string explaining the reviewed decision
Question belongs to Logarithmic and exponential functions, not Algebra: the stem asks for a logarithmic/exponential equation or a log-linear transformation.
Question belongs to Trigonometry, not Logarithmic and exponential functions: the stem asks for a trigonometric identity, R sin/R cos form, or trigonometric equation.

Correctly labeled as Differentiation; question text and mark scheme assess derivatives, tangents/normals, stationary points, or implicit/parametric differentiation, and source question and mark-scheme text are available.
Correctly labeled as Integration; question text and mark scheme assess exact integrals, substitutions, integration by parts, areas, or volumes, and source question and mark-scheme text are available.
Correctly labeled as Trigonometry; question text and mark scheme assess trigonometric identities, R sin/R cos form, or trigonometric equations, and source question and mark-scheme text are available.

Correctly labeled as Algebra; question text and mark scheme assess modulus, polynomial, binomial expansion, or partial-fraction expansion algebra, and source question and mark-scheme text are available.
Question belongs to Differential equations, not Logarithmic and exponential functions: the stem asks students to solve a differential equation or rate model with an initial condition.
